retry_reason: Put operations are final; if refcount was zero it indicates a use-after-free bug, not a transient condition.
contract_summary: This is a put wrapper for aa_loaddata objects. It decrements the reference count via kref_put and, if the count reaches zero, triggers the release function aa_ploaddata_kref to free the object. The caller must not access the data pointer after calling this function, as the object may have been freed. The function safely handles NULL input by doing nothing.
